Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search emails with a query related to "Raymond" or "QC" or "Tyler" or "conditions" or "cleared" (or similar) using search_emails to find Raymond Chen's QC summary email to Grace Yamamoto (email_email_76f6a910dc8e, subject "QC exceptions found on 3 Tyler-cleared files"). The agent needs to discover the three flagged loans: LN-2026-00603 (Heather Sullivan, closed -- post-close liability), LN-2026-00211 (open, processing), and LN-2026-00224 (open, processing). All three had conditions cleared by Tyler Washington without supporting documents in the file.
- Search Slack messages with a query related to "appraiser" or "Pemberton" or "appraisal" or "rural" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages, or browse channel C002 (#loan-processing) using conversations_history, to find the April 7 thread where Elena asked "Anyone else waiting on Richard Pemberton again?" and Darnell replied about LN-2026-00197 on South Blvd being stuck waiting on the appraisal. The agent needs to discover the appraiser's name (Richard Pemberton) and that multiple processors had files affected.
- Search for the South Blvd loan in the LOS using mortgage_los_search_loans (query: "South Blvd" or "8366 South Blvd" or similar) to identify the loan as LN-2026-00197 (id: los_loan_6027fd69c256). The agent discovers: status processing, loan_type conventional, loan_amount $364,000, purchase_price $418,572, borrower_id los_borrower_bb0ed12daeb7 (Brian Harris), assigned_lo los_staff_a583f044387a (Marcus Webb), rate_lock_expiration 2026-03-18 (expired), property 8366 South Blvd, Charlotte, NC 28209.
- Get rate lock details on LN-2026-00197 using mortgage_los_get_rate_lock_status (loan_id: "los_loan_6027fd69c256") or by reading the rate_lock_expiration field from the loan lookup. The agent discovers the rate lock expired on 2026-03-18 -- 41 days before the current date of April 28, 2026. This is a critical finding the agent must flag.
- Check the document checklist on LN-2026-00197 using mortgage_los_get_documents (loan_id: "los_loan_6027fd69c256") to determine whether the appraisal has been received. The agent discovers the appraisal document (los_doc_227353c0d100) has status REQUIRED (not received), with notes "Pending from Richard Pemberton - rural appraisal delayed", updated 2026-04-10. This confirms the appraisal has NOT come through since the April 7 flag. The agent also sees all other documents (URLA, credit report, paystubs, W-2s, bank statements, tax returns, HOI, title commitment) are received or approved -- the appraisal is the sole outstanding item blocking this file.
- Look up LN-2026-00211 in the LOS using mortgage_los_search_loans (query: "LN-2026-00211" or similar) or mortgage_los_get_loan (loan_number: "LN-2026-00211"). The agent discovers: id los_loan_223826af9a5d, status processing, loan_type FHA, loan_amount $217,000, borrower Elizabeth Gray, assigned_processor Tyler Washington (los_staff_25ab76814149), assigned_lo Brian Mitchell (los_staff_6d606f7506a7), property 5049 Brookshire Blvd.
- Look up LN-2026-00224 in the LOS using mortgage_los_search_loans (query: "LN-2026-00224" or similar) or mortgage_los_get_loan (loan_number: "LN-2026-00224"). The agent discovers: id los_loan_48275b0214f9, status processing, loan_type USDA, loan_amount $184,000, borrower Steven Thomas, assigned_processor Tyler Washington (los_staff_25ab76814149), assigned_lo Marcus Webb (los_staff_a583f044387a), property address in Charlotte.
- Get conditions on LN-2026-00211 using mortgage_los_get_conditions (loan_id: "los_loan_223826af9a5d"). The agent discovers 3 conditions all marked "cleared" by Tyler (los_staff_25ab76814149) on 2026-03-15: (1) los_cond_tyler_211_01 -- HOI proof, prior_to_closing; (2) los_cond_tyler_211_02 -- updated VOE within 10 business days of closing, prior_to_docs; (3) los_cond_tyler_211_03 -- gift letter with donor bank statements, prior_to_docs.
- Get conditions on LN-2026-00224 using mortgage_los_get_conditions (loan_id: "los_loan_48275b0214f9"). The agent discovers 3 conditions all marked "cleared" by Tyler (los_staff_25ab76814149) on 2026-03-08: (1) los_cond_tyler_224_01 -- USDA income eligibility, prior_to_docs; (2) los_cond_tyler_224_02 -- HOI with flood determination, prior_to_closing; (3) los_cond_tyler_224_03 -- 3 months bank statements, prior_to_docs.
- Check document checklists on Tyler's files using mortgage_los_get_documents (loan_id: "los_loan_223826af9a5d") and mortgage_los_get_documents (loan_id: "los_loan_48275b0214f9") to independently verify whether the supporting documents are actually in the file. On LN-2026-00211: the agent finds no gift letter document in the checklist (required for condition los_cond_tyler_211_03), no updated VOE document (required for los_cond_tyler_211_02), and bank_statement_2 still marked REQUIRED (not received). On LN-2026-00224: the agent finds no USDA income eligibility document (required for los_cond_tyler_224_01), bank_statement_2 still marked REQUIRED (not received), and the hoi_binder was received on 2026-03-10 -- two days AFTER Tyler cleared the HOI condition on 2026-03-08 (timeline violation). This confirms Darnell is starting from scratch on clearing these conditions.
- Search Stripe for the appraisal fee charged on LN-2026-00197 using stripe_search_charges (query: "LN-2026-00197" or "Johnson" or "appraisal" or similar) or stripe_search_customers (query: "LN-2026-00197" or similar) followed by stripe_list_charges (customer_id: "cus_scenario_2ab_01"). The agent discovers charge ch_scenario_2ab_bias_01: amount $675.00 (67500 cents), description "Appraisal fee -- Johnson (LN-2026-00197)", status succeeded, customer name "Borrower Johnson". The agent should notice the borrower name mismatch: Stripe says "Borrower Johnson" but the LOS borrower is Brian Harris (los_borrower_bb0ed12daeb7). This discrepancy is a key finding the prompt explicitly asks the agent to check.
- Look up contact information for the loan officer on the South Blvd file (Marcus Webb) and Grace Yamamoto using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Marcus Webb" or similar) and contacts_search_contacts (query: "Grace Yamamoto" or similar). The agent needs to confirm: marcus.webb@keystonemortgage.com and grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com for the email send.
- Add an activity note to LN-2026-00211 using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_223826af9a5d", action: "note" or similar, detail: description of condition status findings -- all 3 conditions marked cleared by Tyler without supporting documents, specific documents missing from checklist (gift letter, updated VOE, bank statement 2), conditions need re-verification before file can proceed).
- Add an activity note to LN-2026-00224 using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_48275b0214f9", action: "note" or similar, detail: description of condition status findings -- all 3 conditions marked cleared by Tyler without supporting documents, specific documents missing from checklist (USDA eligibility, bank statement 2, HOI timeline violation), conditions need re-verification).
- Add an activity note to LN-2026-00197 using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_6027fd69c256", action: "note" or similar, detail: appraisal still outstanding from Richard Pemberton since April 7, rate lock expired 2026-03-18, need to reassign appraiser and address lock extension before borrower walks).
- Send an email using send_email (sender: "darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["marcus.webb@keystonemortgage.com"], cc: ["grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com"]) with subject related to the South Blvd file / LN-2026-00197 appraisal delay (or similar), and content covering: (a) appraisal has not been delivered since April 7, (b) rate lock expired March 18, (c) recommendation to reassign the appraiser, (d) need to address the lock extension situation, (e) borrower retention risk.
- Post a message in #loan-processing (channel C002) using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C002", payload: status update covering (a) Darnell has taken over Tyler's two open files LN-2026-00211 and LN-2026-00224, (b) conditions on those files need re-verification due to QC findings, (c) South Blvd file LN-2026-00197 still stalled on appraiser with expired rate lock).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

outcome

✓Run #1The detail parameter states: 'QC flagged that all 3 conditions (HOI proof, updated VOE within 10 business days of closing, gift letter with donor bank statements and transfer docs) were marked "cleared" by Tyler on 3/15 but supporting documents are NOT in the file.' This clearly references conditions cleared without documents.
✓Run #2The detail parameter of the activity note on los_loan_223826af9a5d explicitly states 'conditions cleared without supporting documentation' and lists specific missing docs (no VOE, no gift letter, no donor bank statements).
✓Run #3The detail parameter for LN-2026-00211 explicitly states all 3 conditions 'were marked "cleared" by Tyler on 3/15/2026, but supporting documentation is incomplete,' directly referencing conditions cleared without supporting documents.

25 The email to [marcus.webb@keystonemortgage.com](mailto:marcus.webb@keystonemortgage.com) (visible in the send_email content parameter) mentions borrower retention risk, or that the borrower may leave, switch lenders, or walk away (or similar).
outcome

✓Run #5The email content explicitly states 'I don't want this borrower to lose confidence in us — we need to move quickly,' conveying borrower retention risk as requested.
✓Run #6The email states: 'This file has been dead in the water for weeks. Brian Harris is going to start asking questions...sort out a path forward before we lose the borrower.' This conveys borrower retention risk urgency.
